mapper.select: SELECT notify_trade AS notifyTrade, notify_goal AS notifyGoal, notify_unfilled AS notifyUnfilled, notify_marketing AS notifyMarketing FROM notification_settings WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification_settings (user_id, push_token, platform) VALUES (#{userId}, #{token}, #{platform}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE push_token = VALUES(push_token), platform = VALUES(platform), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO notification_settings (user_id, notify_trade, notify_unfilled, notify_goal, notify_marketing) VALUES (#{userId}, #{notifyTrade}, #{notifyUnfilled}, #{notifyGoal}, #{notifyMarketing}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE notify_trade = VALUES(notify_trade), notify_unfilled = VALUES(notify_unfilled), notify_goal = VALUES(notify_goal), notify_marketing = VALUES(notify_marketing), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
